## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (Vitest, `tests/` mirrors `src/`)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, README as applicable)
- [ ] `make build && make test && make lint && make fmt-check` all pass locally
- [ ] No new outbound network calls outside the user-selected storage backend (see "Privacy invariant" in CONTRIBUTING.md)
